name: Millionaire's Shortbread
recipeIngredient: 7 tablespoons unsalted butter, well-chilled, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Combine flours and sugar in a food processor. Add butter in on/off turns until the mixture is crumbly.
3. Press into an 8x8x2-inch baking pan.
4. Bake for 13-14 minutes, or until the shortbread just begins to color.
5. Remove from oven.
6. For caramel:
a. Melt butter in a heavy medium saucepan over low heat.
b. Add sugar and corn syrup; cook, swirling pan occasionally, until sugar melts.
c. Increase heat to medium and cook until the mixture registers 255°F on a candy thermometer (hard-ball stage), stirring constantly.
d. Cool for 30 seconds; stir in cream (be careful; mixture may bubble).
e. Return to medium heat and stir until the mixture registers 235°F on a candy thermometer (soft-ball stage).
f. Pour hot caramel over shortbread.
5. Allow to cool to room temperature.
6. Spread melted chocolate evenly over caramel.
7. Freeze for 10-15 minutes, or until chocolate is firm.
8. Cut into 1-inch squares.
9. Store in an airtight container in a cool place or refrigerate.
